hero.title: Luviji
hero.subtitle: Family winery & restaurant in the heart of Hvar

story.sectionSubtitle: Over 10 years of passion, tradition and love for wine
story.text: The Luviji family has been tending vineyards on the sun-kissed slopes of Hvar island for generations. Our story is one of dedication to the land, respect for tradition, and the desire to share the authentic taste of Dalmatia with you. In our small family restaurant in the center of Hvar, every dish is prepared with love -- using the freshest local ingredients and our own wines.

wines.sectionSubtitle: Indigenous Hvar grape varieties grown with love

restaurant.text: In our small family restaurant in the center of Hvar town, we serve dishes prepared according to recipes passed down through generations. Fresh grilled fish, octopus under the bell, gregada, homemade pasta, and of course -- our own wines.

cta.title: Experience Authentic Hvar
cta.subtitle: Book a wine tasting or reserve a table in our restaurant and discover true Dalmatian tradition.

about.sectionSubtitle: A family tradition spanning over 10 years
about.story:
Luviji Winery was born from a deep love for the land of Hvar and its winemaking tradition. For over a decade, our vineyards on the sun-drenched slopes of Hvar island have been producing grapes of exceptional quality. Every bottle of our wine carries a story of patience, dedication, and respect for nature.

Our small family restaurant in the very center of Hvar town is where this story continues at the table. Here, we offer our guests authentic Hvar dishes prepared with the freshest local ingredients, paired with our wines -- creating an experience that stays in memory.
about.mission: Our mission is to preserve and share the richness of Hvar's winemaking and gastronomic heritage with visitors from around the world.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.text: We preserve and continue centuries-old Hvar winemaking tradition

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: Every drop of our wine is the result of careful work and dedication to quality

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.text: Every guest is part of our family -- warmth and cordiality are in our blood

passion.title: Passion
passion.text: Love for wine, food and Hvar drives everything we do

footer.tagline: Family winery and restaurant in the heart of Hvar island. Indigenous wines, traditional Dalmatian cuisine and the warmth of home.
